ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental data entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the researcher */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the specimens (e.g., WT) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age category of the specimens (e.g., Adult) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the experiment was conducted (e.g., BaCl_LAP4) */,
  "photoreceptor" TEXT /* Type of photoreceptor being analyzed (e.g., Rods) */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of specimens used in the experiment */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., rmax, rdim) */,
  "avg" REAL /* Average value of the metric */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "sem" REAL /* Standard error of the mean for the metric */,
  "ci" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metric */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "significance" TEXT /* Significance status (e.g., -, +, etc.) */,
  "date_of_experiment" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the experiment */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Audit trail for data changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, lab technician) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the researcher (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each experimental data entry
Age category of the specimens (e.g., Adult)
Condition under which the experiment was conducted (e.g., BaCl_LAP4)
Type of photoreceptor being analyzed (e.g., Rods)
Number of specimens used in the experiment
Standard error of the mean for the metric
Lower bound of the confidence interval
Upper bound of the confidence interval
Date when the experiment was conducted
Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed)
Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, lab technician)
Access level of the researcher (e.g., admin, user)
Unique identifier for the data source
